name: Clock Divider
description: This algorithm is a simple clock divider, outputting slower clocks from a faster one. The channels can use completely independent clocks, or share clocks. There is a shared reset input and a per-channel reset input. If either is active, the channel is reset.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: The divisor type. The options are Free, Metrical (2), and Metrical (2,3).

parameters.name: Divisor
parameters.description: The divisor, if the type is Free. The divisor value is simply the parameter value.

parameters.name: Divisor
parameters.description: The divisor, if the type is Metrical (2). Chooses between 1, 2, 4, 8, 16, & 32.

parameters.name: Divisor
parameters.description: The divisor, if the type is Metrical (2,3). Chooses between 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 8, 12, 16, 24, & 32.

parameters.name: Enable
parameters.description: Enables the channel. A disabled channel outputs nothing.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

parameters.name: ES-5 Expander
parameters.description: If set, the ES-5 expander header to use for output instead of the bus specified by the Output parameter. 1 means the ES-5 itself.

input_ports.name: Input
input_ports.description: The clock input bus to divide.

input_ports.name: Reset input
input_ports.description: The reset input bus for this channel.

output_ports.name: ES-5 Output
output_ports.description: If using an ES-5 expander output, sets which of the 8 outputs on the expander to use.
